name: equals
description: Matches records where severity is warning or higher.

name: greater
description: Includes records where numeric field is above a threshold.

additionalParams.name: threshold
additionalParams.description: Numeric lower bound for the selected field.

name: smaller
description: Includes records where numeric field is below a threshold.

additionalParams.name: maxValue
additionalParams.description: Numeric upper bound for the selected field.

name: inRange
description: Includes records where numeric field is between min and max values.

additionalParams.name: minValue
additionalParams.description: Minimum numeric value for range matching.

additionalParams.name: maxValue
additionalParams.description: Maximum numeric value for range matching.

name: isUpperCase
description: Includes records where the selected text field is uppercase.

name: inRangeText
description: Includes records where text values are within the configured lexical range.

additionalParams.name: minValue
additionalParams.description: Lower bound text value for range matching.

additionalParams.name: maxValue
additionalParams.description: Upper bound text value for range matching.

name: inRangeIP
description: Includes records where IPv4 values are within the configured address range.

additionalParams.name: minValue
additionalParams.description: Lower bound IPv4 value for range matching.

additionalParams.name: maxValue
additionalParams.description: Upper bound IPv4 value for range matching.
